ciphertext.description: Hex bytes already aligned to cipher XOR stage (no spaces).

ciphertext_bits.description: Optional bitstring '0'/'1' aligned to cipher XOR stage.

channel.description: Optional logical channel name (e.g. tch3_speech, facch9_mux).

sync_id.description: Optional sync identifier (decoder-specific; e.g., FACCH9 vs TCH9).

nbits.description: Optional number of cipher bits (used with ciphertext_bits).

kc.description: GMR-1 session key Kc (8 bytes hex). Required when scheme=gmr1.

fn.description: GMR-1 frame number. Integer or 0x-prefixed string.

key.description: GMR-2 key (8 bytes hex). Required when scheme=gmr2.

direction.description: GMR-2 direction bit (used only in default pack_frame_to_s).

initial_s.description: Optional 8-byte initial S override for *first* key-frame only (hex).
